sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this sports title

special_mechanics.name: Flying Leap
special_mechanics.description: Player jumps forward at opposition ball carrier to attempt tackle and steal ball. If successful, tackles opponent. If unsuccessful, player rolls along the floor.

special_mechanics.name: Ball Stealing
special_mechanics.description: Ball can be stolen from ballhandler through flying leap maneuver or by opponent touching ballhandler

special_mechanics.name: Court Hazards
special_mechanics.description: Soda cans and candy wrappers on court cause ballhandler to fall when stepped on, allowing theft. Players can also fall over referee in same manner.

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/qualitative data only. Source is Wikipedia article which provides gameplay mechanics and design information but contains no documented physics parameters, movement speeds, gravity values, or sub-pixel data. Game is a basketball sports title with emphasis on melee combat and ball physics rather than precise character movement mechanics.
